name: Barry Altschul
abstract: Barry Altschul (born January 6, 1943, in New York City) is an American free jazz and hard bop drummer, who first came to notice in the late 1960s for performing with pianists Paul Bley and Chick Corea.

concerts.label: Newport Jazz Festival: George Coleman Octet/ Ted Curson Sextet/ Anthony Braxton Quintet
Midnight Performance: Newport Jazz Festival: Sam Rivers Quartet and Orchestra

about_quotes.speaker: Chick Corea
about_quotes.evidence: We actually rehearsed at our 19th Street loft for months before we found a drummer. We would just play together, piano and bass. Then we said, “Well, let’s make a trio,” and we started looking for a drummer, and Barry joined us, and that’s how that all began.
about_quotes.doc_title: Chick Corea — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Konitz Lee
about_quotes.evidence: One time I was invited up to someone’s apartment with Chick, Dave Holland, Barry Altschul, and Anthony Braxton.
about_quotes.doc_title: Konitz Lee — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
